step_rationale: Macrophage-derived protease inhibitor; suppresses neutrophil degranulation post-MI inflammation.
mechanism: MUG1 inhibits neutrophil serine protease release, dampening post-MI inflammatory injury.

references.title: Macrophages secrete murinoglobulin-1 and galectin-3 to regulate neutrophil degranulation after myocardial infarction.
